seo_title: Google Introduces AI-Powered YouTube Shorts Remix Feature
meta_description: Google has introduced a new AI-powered feature for YouTube Shorts that allows users to remix other people's videos using Gemini Omni.
body_html:
Google has introduced a new AI-powered feature for YouTube Shorts that allows users to remix other people's videos using Gemini Omni.

Users can restyle clips or insert themselves into other people's videos The feature uses Gemini Omni to turn a video into a new creation Creamers can enable or disable the ability to reimagine videos

Remix Icon Located at the bottom of a YouTube Short, allows users to reimagine videos

Digital Watermark Added to remixed shorts to link back to the original video

Creamers can control whether their videos are remixed or not Remixed videos will have a digital watermark and link back to the original video

source.title: You can now remix other people’s YouTube Shorts with AI
source.summary: Google has introduced a new feature on YouTube Shorts called Remix, which allows users to restyle clips or insert themselves into other people's videos using AI technology from Gemini Omni. The feature is accessible by clicking the "Remix" icon at the bottom of a YouTube Short. Users can prompt the AI tool to transform a video in various ways.
